org.jfree.chart.annotations

Class XYMeasurementAnnotation

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jfree.chart.annotations.AbstractAnnotation
      • org.jfree.chart.annotations.AbstractXYAnnotation
        • org.jfree.chart.annotations.XYTextAnnotation
          • org.jfree.chart.annotations.XYMeasurementAnnotation
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Cloneable, Annotation, XYAnnotation, PublicCloneable

    public class XYMeasurementAnnotation
extends XYTextAnnotation
implements Cloneable, PublicCloneable, Serializable
    An annotation to illustrate a measurement between two points on an XYPlot.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation
      Specifies how to draw this annotation.

      The default arrow length (in Java2D units).

      The default arrow width (in Java2D units).

      The default label offset (in Java2D units).

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      XYMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation, String text, double x1, double y1, double x2, double y2)
      Creates a new annotation to be displayed at the given coordinates.
      XYMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation, String text, Point2D p1, Point2D p2)
      Creates a new annotation to be displayed at the given coordinates.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Object clone()
      Returns a clone of the annotation.
      protected XYAnnotationEntity createEntity(Shape hotspot, int rendererIndex, String toolTipText, String urlText)
      A factory method for creating an XYAnnotationEntity for this annotation.
      void draw(Graphics2D g2, XYPlot plot, Rectangle2D dataArea, ValueAxis domainAxis, ValueAxis rangeAxis, int rendererIndex, PlotRenderingInfo info)
      Draws the annotation.
      protected void drawHorizontal(Graphics2D g2, XYPlot plot, Rectangle2D dataArea, ValueAxis domainAxis, ValueAxis rangeAxis, int rendererIndex, PlotRenderingInfo info)
      Draws the annotation horizontally.
      protected void drawVertical(Graphics2D g2, XYPlot plot, Rectangle2D dataArea, ValueAxis domainAxis, ValueAxis rangeAxis, int rendererIndex, PlotRenderingInfo info)
      Draws the annotation vertically.
      boolean equals(Object obj)
      Tests this annotation for equality with an arbitrary object.
      double getArrowLength()
      Returns the arrow length.
      Paint getArrowPaint()
      Returns the paint used for the arrow.
      Stroke getArrowStroke()
      Returns the stroke used to draw the arrow line.
      double getArrowWidth()
      Returns the arrow width.
      double getLabelOffset()
      Returns the label offset.
      Paint getMeasureLinePaint()
      Returns the paint used for the measure line.
      Stroke getMeasureLineStroke()
      Returns the stroke used to draw the measure line.
      XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation getOrientation()
      Returns how this annotation is drawn.
      double getX2()
      Returns the x2 coordinate for the text anchor point (measured against the domain axis).
      double getY2()
      Returns the y2 coordinate for the text anchor point (measured against the range axis).
      int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code for the object.
      boolean isBaseCreateEntity()
      Returns true (is default) if a chart entity is always created.
      protected boolean isCreateEntity() 
      void setArrowLength(double length)
      Sets the arrow length and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setArrowPaint(Paint paint)
      Sets the paint used for the arrow and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setArrowStroke(Stroke stroke)
      Sets the stroke used to draw the arrow line and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setArrowWidth(double width)
      Sets the arrow width and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setBaseCreateEntity(boolean createEntity)
      If true, always creates an entity, regardless of tooltip or url.
      void setLabelOffset(double offset)
      Sets the label offset (from the arrow base, continuing in a straight line, in Java2D units) and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setMeasureLinePaint(Paint paint)
      Sets the paint used for the measure line and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setMeasureLineStroke(Stroke stroke)
      Sets the stroke used to draw the measure line and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setOrientation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation)
      Sets the orientation to use when drawing this annotation.
      void setX2(double x)
      Sets the x2 coordinate for the text anchor point (measured against the domain axis) and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.
      void setY2(double y)
      Sets the y2 coordinate for the text anchor point (measured against the range axis) and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.

    • Constructor Detail

      • XYMeasurementAnnotation

        public XYMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation,
                               String text,
                               Point2D p1,
                               Point2D p2)
        Creates a new annotation to be displayed at the given coordinates. The coordinates are specified in data space (they will be converted to Java2D space for display).
        Parameters:
        orientation - the orientation to use when drawing this annotation.
        text - the text (null not permitted).
        p1 - the first coordinate (in data space).
        p2 - the second coordinate (in data space).

      • XYMeasurementAnnotation

        public XYMeasurementAnnotation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation,
                               String text,
                               double x1,
                               double y1,
                               double x2,
                               double y2)
        Creates a new annotation to be displayed at the given coordinates. The coordinates are specified in data space (they will be converted to Java2D space for display).
        Parameters:
        orientation - the orientation to use when drawing this annotation.
        text - the text (null not permitted).
        x1 - the first x-coordinate (in data space).
        y1 - the first y-coordinate (in data space).
        x2 - the second x-coordinate (in data space).
        y2 - the second y-coordinate (in data space).

    • Method Detail

      • getOrientation

        public XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation getOrientation()
        Returns how this annotation is drawn.
        Returns:
        how this annotation is drawn
        See Also:

        public void setOrientation(XYMeasurementAnnotation.Orientation orientation)

        Returns the x2 coordinate for the text anchor point (measured against the domain axis).

      • setX2

        public void setX2(double x)
        Sets the x2 coordinate for the text anchor point (measured against the domain axis) and sends an AnnotationChangeEvent to all registered listeners.

        x - the x2 coordinate (in data space).

        See Also:
        getMeasureLinePaint()

      • isBaseCreateEntity

        public boolean isBaseCreateEntity()
        Returns true (is default) if a chart entity is always created. This is required to enable the chart entity to be movable.
        Returns:
        true if a chart entity is always created, false otherwise.

      • setBaseCreateEntity

        public void setBaseCreateEntity(boolean createEntity)
        If true, always creates an entity, regardless of tooltip or url.
        Parameters:
        createEntity - true if a chart entity needs to be created at all times.
        See Also:
        isBaseCreateEntity()

      • isCreateEntity

        protected boolean isCreateEntity()
        Returns:
        true if a chart entity should be created, false otherwise.

      • draw

        public void draw(Graphics2D g2,
                 XYPlot plot,
                 Rectangle2D dataArea,
                 ValueAxis domainAxis,
                 ValueAxis rangeAxis,
                 int rendererIndex,
                 PlotRenderingInfo info)
        Description copied from class: XYTextAnnotation
        Draws the annotation.
        Specified by:
        draw in interface XYAnnotation
        Overrides:
        draw in class XYTextAnnotation
        Parameters:
        g2 - the graphics device.
        plot - the plot.
        dataArea - the data area.
        domainAxis - the domain axis.
        rangeAxis - the range axis.
        rendererIndex - the renderer index.
        info - an optional info object that will be populated with entity information.

      • drawHorizontal

        protected void drawHorizontal(Graphics2D g2,
                              XYPlot plot,
                              Rectangle2D dataArea,
                              ValueAxis domainAxis,
                              ValueAxis rangeAxis,
                              int rendererIndex,
                              PlotRenderingInfo info)
        Draws the annotation horizontally.
        Parameters:
        g2 - the graphics device.
        plot - the plot.
        dataArea - the data area.
        domainAxis - the domain axis.
        rangeAxis - the range axis.
        rendererIndex - the renderer index.
        info - if supplied, this info object will be populated with entity information.

      • drawVertical

        protected void drawVertical(Graphics2D g2,
                            XYPlot plot,
                            Rectangle2D dataArea,
                            ValueAxis domainAxis,
                            ValueAxis rangeAxis,
                            int rendererIndex,
                            PlotRenderingInfo info)
        Draws the annotation vertically.

        g2 - the graphics device.
        plot - the plot.
        dataArea - the data area.
        domainAxis - the domain axis.
        rangeAxis - the range axis.
        rendererIndex - the renderer index.
        info - if supplied, this info object will be populated with entity information.
